name: 50"x60" Throw Woven Pattern Medium Orange/Cream - Threshold™ Designed with Studio McGee
description:
Accent your space with the sophisticated style of the Throw Woven Pattern from Threshold™ Designed with Studio McGee. Showcasing a woven pattern in orange and cream hues, this throw features fringes for an elevated look. This midweight throw feels nice and toasty as you wrap it around yourself while watching TV, reading or indulging in other activities.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
